Ported as direct synchronous methods and tool helpers on `InMemoryVectorIndex` rather than a Rust async trait.

Ported as a Crystal alias over `{score, id, JSON::Any}` tuples used by index result helpers.

Ported as a typed Crystal exception with constructor helpers for the upstream error variants rather than a Rust enum.

Builder state, fluent setters, and validation parity are ported.
